name: python3-pyodbc
title: python3-pyodbc
summary: Python3 module for ODBC database access
description:
Python3 module for ODBC database access
A Python3 DB API 2 module for ODBC. No 3rd party libraries are required.
Only native Python datatypes are used, such as decimal and datetime.
It implements the Python Database API Specification v2.0.
For example:
import pyodbc
Next, create a connection by passing an ODBC connection string to the
connect method. This step causes ODBC to load the database driver (the SQL
Server driver in this example) and connect to the database.
cnxn = pyodbc.connect('DSN=northwind')
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-pyodbc because Python3 module for ODBC database access.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-pyodbc as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-pyodbc with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-pyodbc --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
